items.title: edgeless question...
items.author: /u/buddygnarlson
items.content: also n00b, but I can't get on the Discord server, so here goes. It seems to me that the Canvas/Whiteboard/Edgeless is specific to single notes. How do I interrelate my notes in a workspace with each other in a main whiteboard? I've searched around FAQs and videos and haven't really found an answer to this. My brain is struggling to wrap my head around the utility of having individual documents with whiteboard functionality but not a workspace as a whole

items.title: discord server- can't access?

items.content: hi, n00b here, can't seem to access the discord...?
